title: neobolusia ciliata
intro: Neobolusia ciliata is a plant species in the family Sapotaceae, commonly known as the Cape yellowwood or Yellow stinkwood, native to southern Africa. The medicinal properties of Neobolusia ciliata include its antiseptic, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, aid in wound healing, and provide relief from fever, making it a valuable natural remedy. Neobolusia ciliata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are used to treat various ailments, and its bark can also be used to make a medicinal oil.
